summary: Baden-Württemberg 2026 polls show CDU consistently leading at ~29%, Greens at 21-23%, AfD at 20%
content:
Latest polls for BW 2026 Landtag election:

INSA (Jan 20-27, 2026): CDU 29%, Grüne 21%, AfD 20%, SPD 10%, Linke 7%, FDP 5%
Infratest dimap (Jan 14-20, 2026): CDU 29%, Grüne 23%, AfD 20%, SPD 8%, Linke 7%, FDP 5%
Infratest dimap (Oct 8-14, 2025): CDU 29%, Grüne 20%, AfD 21%, SPD 10%, Linke 7%, FDP 5%
INSA (Oct 7-14, 2025): CDU 31%, Grüne 17%, AfD 20%, SPD 11%, Linke 7%, FDP 7%

PolitPro election trend (Feb 11, 2026): CDU 29.0%, Grüne 21.9%, AfD 20.0%, SPD 9.1%, Linke 7.0%, FDP 5.0%

Seat projections from PolitPro (based on trend):
CDU: 38 seats (31.7%)
Grüne: 28 seats (23.3%)
AfD: 26 seats (21.7%)
SPD: 12 seats (10%)
Linke: 9 seats (7.5%)
FDP: 8 seats (6.7%)
Total: ~121 seats (minimum 120)

2021 result: Greens 32.6% (strongest), CDU 24.1%
The CDU leads the Greens by about 7-8 percentage points consistently.
New electoral law applies from 2026.
